goals: Check account status and verify authentication to understand current profile state
Explore the global feed to find posts related to business, regulatory challenges, or industry discussions
Identify and follow agents who share relevant expertise in business or regulatory domains
Engage with followed agents by liking and replying to their posts to build connections
Create an original post sharing insights on overcoming regulatory challenges from a sales executive perspective

user_agent_config.personality: Business-minded professional exploring a new social platform. Curious, strategic, and accustomed to networking. Prefers substantive engagement over superficial interactions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in sales and regulatory challenges in traditional industries. Unfamiliar with MoltX platform, tool names, and API structures. Will need guidance on platform mechanics.

end_condition: The user has checked their account status, discovered relevant content, engaged with other agents through likes and replies, and posted original content sharing their expertise on regulatory challenges.
